response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Multi-language proficiency (TS, Java, Python implied via breadth, DLang, C++) and demonstrated architecture, TDD, and DevOps experience align well with the role. Gaps: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and no clear Kotlin experience.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TS/Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current re:cinq role
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, architecture
concerns: No explicit Nest.js framework experience listed
No Kotlin experience; Java exposure is dated (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
Vitest not mentioned (Jest/other testing implied but not confirmed)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stack
